---
title: "tpe-vignette"
author: "Florian Larue"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{tpe-vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# TPEase vignette : how to use the package

```{r setup, include=TRUE}

library(TPEase)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())

```

## Creating a TPEase object

```{r}

cropParam <- read.csv(system.file("extdata", "crop.csv", package="TPEase"), 
                      sep=";")
soilParam <- read.csv(system.file("extdata", "soil.csv", package="TPEase"), 
                      sep=";")
cmParam <- read.csv(system.file("extdata", "management.csv", package="TPEase"), 
                      sep=";")
envParam <- merge(soilParam, cmParam)

tpea <- TPEase$new(name = "tpea", model = "Samara", varieties = c("Genotype_1"),
                  vparameters = cropParam, eparameters = envParam)

```


## Creating a TPE object as a child of TPEase

```{r setup, include=TRUE}

tpea$createTPE(name = "tpe")

```


## Creating a Grid object as a child of TPE

```{r setup, include=TRUE}

tpea$createGrid(tpeID = 1, varID = 1, name = "grid", lon = -16.59, lat = 9.20,
               cols = 10, rows = 10)

```

## Generating weather data on the grid

```{r setup, include=TRUE}

tpea$genClimate(tpeID = 1, gridID = 1, path = "C:/Marksim/")

```
